violations.text: Thermometers are lacking in the walk-in cooler and the storefront dairy/deli reach-in. All cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer inside the unit that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2025

The doors to the outside, located at the entrance, are not tight-fitting. Space observed between the 2 doors. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2026
Boxes of food were observed stored on the floor in the stock room. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026

Back room is overstocked. Pallets are up against the walls with no space between them resulting in an inability to inspect for pest activity. Pallets and u-boats must be 6 inches from the walls and each other in order to properly inspect for pest activity. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the walk-in cooler and the dairy/deli reach-in refrigerator. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2025

The doors to the outside, located at the entrance, are not tight-fitting. Space observed between the doors. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2025

Back room is overstocked. Pallets are up against the walls with no space between them resulting in an inability to inspect for pest activity. Pallets and u-boats must be 6 inches from the walls and each other in order to properly inspect for pest activity. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
